---
title: 'Happy Star Wars Day! May the 4th be with you!'
date: '2014-05-05T00:02:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'LIFE in Review (s)'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1644594259973704022'
blogger_filename: '/2014/05/happy-star-wars-day-may-4th-be-with-you.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/LIFE in Review (s)/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Enjoy'
---

Today is May 4th. And it's Star Wars Day!<br /><br />For those of you who are a little slow on uptake with this one; say:<br />May the Force<br />Now say:<br />May the 4th<br />Aha! I get it!
